title: While the Patient Slept
writer: Robert N. Lee, Eugene Solow, Mignon G. Eberhart
actors: Aline MacMahon, Guy Kibbee, Lyle Talbot
plot: Grandfather is sick and the family and his lawyer gather around waiting for him to die. When he receives a telegram from his disinherited son, Charles, he passes out and a nurse, Sarah, comes to the house to attend to him. His oth...
